channel.title: internship on damiloladolor
channel.description: Recent content in internship on damiloladolor

item.title: Hng Internship
item.description: I recently signed up for HNGi8 internship organized by zuri team. It is a fast-paced training program for people interested in making a career in tech where participants are given tasks to complete based on your chosen track and upon successful completion, advance to next stages. In this article, I will be documenting my goal for joining this internship and what I want to achieve. The internship has 10 stages and lasts for about 2-3 months and as of now, I am currently in the first stage.
